message:
test(agentmail): Add unit tests for FlexTime, ReservationConflict, FetchInbox

Expand test coverage for the agentmail package internals:

client_test.go:
- Add TestFlexTime_UnmarshalJSON: cover RFC3339, RFC3339Nano, bare
  timestamps without timezone (assumed UTC), empty strings, and
  invalid format error handling
- Add TestFlexTime_MarshalJSON: verify RFC3339Nano output
- Add TestReservationConflict_UnmarshalJSON: handle null holders
  becoming empty slice, legacy list-of-strings format, current
  list-of-objects format with agent/agent_name fields
- Add TestFetchInbox_UnmarshalFormats: cover both wrapper object
  format (`{"result":[...]}`) and direct array format (`[...]`)

resource_test.go:
- Add TestListReservations_ResourcePathAndFiltering: verify resource
  URI construction with active_only param and agent name filtering
- Add TestListReservations_FallbackToToolsWhenResourceFails: test
  graceful degradation from resources/read to tools/call when the
  server doesn't support the resource view

Part of: bd-mthe9 (unit tests for internal/agentmail)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
